name: Blueberry Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions: Combine the first four ingredients; stir well. Place the blueberries in the unbaked pastry shell and sprinkle one tablespoon of sugar over the berries. Spread the sour cream mixture over the berries. Combine the breadcrumbs, one tablespoon of sugar, and butter. Sprinkle this mixture over the top. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes or until the center is firm. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
